seoDescription: JH Electric — Sonoma native Javier Hernandez has run his own licensed electrical business in Sonoma, CA since 2003, handling residential and commercial wiring, re-wires and panel upgrades. CSLB #816936.
heroSubheading: JH Electric is Javier Hernandez's Sonoma electrical business — a Sonoma native who has worked in the trade since 1996 and gone out on his own since 2003, handling residential and commercial wiring, troubleshooting and panel upgrades.
highlights: Owner-operated by Sonoma native Javier Hernandez
aboutBody: JH Electric is owned and operated by Javier Hernandez, a Sonoma native who began working in the electrical field in 1996 and started his own business in 2003. Based in Sonoma, he serves homeowners and businesses around the Sonoma Valley.

JH Electric focuses on residential and commercial electrical work for both new construction and remodels, specializing in troubleshooting, re-wiring and panel upgrades. The business is a licensed C-10 electrical contractor, California contractor's license #816936.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Upgrading and replacing electrical panels to safely handle modern household and business loads.

services.title: Wiring & Re-Wiring
services.description: New wiring and re-wires for remodels, additions and new construction, residential or commercial.

services.title: Troubleshooting & Repair
services.description: Diagnosing and fixing electrical problems, faults and code issues throughout your property.

services.title: New Construction & Remodels
services.description: Complete electrical for remodels and new builds, handled by the owner himself.

testimonials.quote: Javier was reasonably priced, knowledgeable and provided very good service and communication — responsive when we needed him on site.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Sonoma

notes: Sources: CSLB license lookup (cslb.ca.gov/816936 — J H ELECTRIC, C-10 Electrical, ACTIVE, exp 01/31/2027 — verified directly), BBB (Sonoma; not accredited, not rated), Yelp, Facebook. Website status: NO website (Facebook + Yelp + directory listings only) — strong target. Owner Javier Hernandez, sole ownership; Sonoma native, in trade since 1996, business since 2003 (BBB start date 2/1/2003). Phone (707) 935-2800 (alt 707-953-7783). Address 104 El Portola Dr, Sonoma, CA 95476. TRUST SIGNAL = verified CSLB #816936 (active C-10). CAUTION applied: a search result wrongly attributed license #872324 to JH — that # actually belongs to S A K Enterprises / AC Electric, so I verified JH's real license (#816936) directly before asserting. Testimonial is a condensed but faithful paraphrase of real Yelp review language (Yelp 403 blocks exact-text capture in this env).
